headline: Principal to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: DES MOINES, Iowa, April 01, 2026--Principal Financial Group® (Nasdaq: PFG) announced today that it will release first quarter 2026 financial results after U.S. markets close on Thursday, April 23, 2026.

headline: Principal Financial Group's Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
summary: Principal Financial Group is poised to release its first-quarter results soon, and analysts project a double-digit earnings growth.
